Title: Initial Discovery Session (No-Charge)
Description: Two-hour no-charge kickoff session with Sanford Coggins and designated VWC stakeholders. Understand VWC's current investor acquisition motion, target personas (accredited investors, RIAs, family offices), growth objectives, existing tech stack (CRM, email, data sources), compliance posture (Reg D 506(b)/506(c), CAN-SPAM, TCPA, state solicitation rules), budget envelope, and success metrics. No invoice will be issued for these hours. At session close, Client decides whether to proceed to billable work.

Title: AI Lead Gen Strategy Brief & Persona Definitions
Description: Document findings from the discovery session into a one-page AI Lead Gen strategy brief. Define 2-3 target personas (accredited investor, RIA partner, family office) with firmographic/demographic screens, typical buying motion, preferred channels, and red-flag exclusions. Recommend channel mix (outbound email, LinkedIn, intent-data, event marketing). Propose KPIs and targets for pilot phase.

Title: Architecture Design & Vendor Short-List
Description: Design end-to-end AI lead generation architecture: data ingestion sources, enrichment layer (Clay/Apollo/ZoomInfo/LinkedIn), LLM selection (Claude/GPT/open-source), scoring engine, outreach orchestration (n8n/Make/Zapier/native), CRM integration target (HubSpot/Salesforce/Pipedrive), and analytics dashboard. Produce architecture diagram. Build vendor short-list with monthly cost, pros/cons, compliance notes (SOC 2, data residency, GDPR where relevant), and integration complexity.

Title: Client Review & Backlog Prioritization
Description: Walk Client through architecture and vendor short-list. Capture decisions on tool selection. Build prioritized implementation backlog with MoSCoW (Must/Should/Could/Won't). Confirm Client has procured or will procure required third-party subscriptions before Phase 3 begins.

Title: Data Pipeline & Enrichment Build
Description: Stand up the data ingestion pipeline against Client-approved sources. Configure enrichment provider(s) to attach firmographic, demographic, and wealth-screening attributes to each prospect record. Implement deduplication and normalization. Build a reviewable staging table where Client can inspect enriched records before they flow into scoring. Document data lineage for compliance evidence.

Title: LLM-Based Lead Scoring Model
Description: Implement an LLM-assisted lead scoring model that ranks prospects by fit and engagement likelihood. Model must emit a numeric score plus a human-readable rationale that a compliance reviewer can audit. Include prompt templates for each persona, temperature/consistency controls, and a fallback deterministic rule when LLM is unavailable. Include unit tests with known-good and known-bad exemplar records.

Title: AI Outreach Sequences & Human-in-the-Loop Review UI
Description: Build AI-generated outreach sequences (email + LinkedIn) that personalize copy per persona and lead. Implement a human-in-the-loop review workflow: Client-designated reviewer sees draft messages, can edit/approve/reject, and only approved messages are sent. Configure sender warm-up guidance, SPF/DKIM/DMARC verification, and suppression list management. Include opt-out handling compliant with CAN-SPAM.

Title: CRM Integration (Bi-Directional)
Description: Push scored and qualified leads into Client's CRM with full provenance: source, enrichment attributes, score, LLM rationale, and next-best-action recommendation. Pull CRM disposition back into the pipeline to close the loop (meeting booked, not interested, converted, etc.). Configure field mappings, duplicate detection against existing CRM records, and error handling.

Title: KPI Dashboard Build
Description: Build leadership dashboard showing pipeline velocity, outreach send volume, reply rate, meetings booked, SQL-to-investor conversion, and tool cost per qualified lead. Wire real-time data from pipeline, outreach platform, and CRM. Include drill-down by persona, channel, and campaign. Dashboard hosted in Client's preferred BI tool or lightweight web dashboard.

Title: Pilot Campaign Run & Analysis
Description: Run a controlled pilot against a Client-approved prospect list (typically 200-500 records). Monitor deliverability, reply rate, meetings booked, false-positive rate, and any compliance flags. Produce pilot results report with data, observations, and tuning recommendations. Identify any prompt, scoring, or channel adjustments required before broader rollout.

Title: Tuning & Go-Live Enablement
Description: Apply tuning based on pilot findings: refine scoring thresholds, rewrite underperforming outreach templates, adjust persona definitions as needed. Build go-live checklist: reviewer training, escalation paths, campaign approval workflow, monthly budget guardrails. Obtain Client written authorization to proceed to full rollout.

Title: Operator Runbook & Architecture Reference
Description: Produce an operator runbook covering day-to-day operations: how to add a new persona, review queue, approve outreach, handle suppressions, investigate deliverability issues, and troubleshoot pipeline failures. Produce architecture reference document covering system components, vendor contracts, API keys vaulting, and disaster recovery. All documentation stored in Client's knowledge base.

Title: Training Session(s)
Description: Conduct live training session(s) with VWC staff who will operate the system post-launch. Record sessions for onboarding future team members. Cover: reviewer workflow, dashboard interpretation, how to spot drift in scoring, how to escalate to Technijian under ongoing advisory. Capture questions and update runbook accordingly.

Title: Strategic Review Session
Description: Periodic strategic review session (typical duration 1-2 hours). Review system performance since last session, discuss new lead gen opportunities, evaluate new LLMs or enrichment providers, and align roadmap with Client's business priorities. Triggered by Client request under ongoing T&M advisory.

Title: Model & Vendor Refresh
Description: On Client request: evaluate newer LLM models or enrichment providers for cost or performance wins, pilot replacements against current production, and migrate if justified. Includes updating prompts and scoring calibrations as models evolve.

Title: Outreach Copy & Persona Refresh
Description: Refresh outreach copy, subject lines, and persona definitions to prevent fatigue and maintain reply rates. Typically triggered quarterly or when reply rate trends down. Includes small A/B experiments and rollout of winning variants.

Title: Engagement Conclusion & Handoff
Description: Upon Client's written notice to conclude the engagement: (1) deliver final invoice for actual hours performed; (2) hand off all runbooks, configurations, prompts, and dashboards; (3) transfer any Technijian-held credentials back to Client or destroy at Client direction; (4) confirm Client has full administrative control of all systems. No offboarding fee.
